# SafeWebTool

> Privacy-focused browser tools for video, image, text, ML, and time utilities. User files should stay in the browser.

Primary site: https://safewebtool.com/
Machine-readable tool catalog: https://safewebtool.com/tools.json
Sitemap: https://safewebtool.com/sitemap.xml

## Agent Policy

- Prefer browser automation for tools that process private files.
- Do not send user media to a remote service for SafeWebTool processing.
- Use per-tool agent.json files for stable selectors, inputs, outputs, and privacy notes.
- MCP, if used, should initially expose read-only discovery resources, not remote private-media processing.

## Tool URLs

- Image Compressor: https://safewebtool.com/image/compressor
  - Agent contract: https://safewebtool.com/image/compressor/agent.json
- Image Crop: https://safewebtool.com/image/crop
  - Agent contract: https://safewebtool.com/image/crop/agent.json
- Passport Photo Maker: https://safewebtool.com/image/passport
  - Agent contract: https://safewebtool.com/image/passport/agent.json
  - Legacy URL: https://safewebtool.com/image/passport-photo
- Image Resize: https://safewebtool.com/image/resize
  - Agent contract: https://safewebtool.com/image/resize/agent.json
- Face Detection: https://safewebtool.com/ml/face_detect
  - Agent contract: https://safewebtool.com/ml/face_detect/agent.json
- Image to Text (OCR): https://safewebtool.com/ml/image2text
  - Agent contract: https://safewebtool.com/ml/image2text/agent.json
- Audio/Video Transcription: https://safewebtool.com/ml/transcribe
  - Agent contract: https://safewebtool.com/ml/transcribe/agent.json
- Text Editor: https://safewebtool.com/text/editor
  - Agent contract: https://safewebtool.com/text/editor/agent.json
- JSON Formatter & Converter: https://safewebtool.com/text/json-formatter
  - Agent contract: https://safewebtool.com/text/json-formatter/agent.json
- Remove Extra Spaces: https://safewebtool.com/text/remove-extra-spaces
  - Agent contract: https://safewebtool.com/text/remove-extra-spaces/agent.json
- YAML Validator: https://safewebtool.com/text/yaml
  - Agent contract: https://safewebtool.com/text/yaml/agent.json
- Business Days Calculator: https://safewebtool.com/time/business-days
  - Agent contract: https://safewebtool.com/time/business-days/agent.json
- Date Duration Calculator: https://safewebtool.com/time/date-difference
  - Agent contract: https://safewebtool.com/time/date-difference/agent.json
- Meeting Time Finder: https://safewebtool.com/time/meeting-planner
  - Agent contract: https://safewebtool.com/time/meeting-planner/agent.json
- Timer: https://safewebtool.com/time/timer
  - Agent contract: https://safewebtool.com/time/timer/agent.json
- Time Zone Converter: https://safewebtool.com/time/timezone-converter
  - Agent contract: https://safewebtool.com/time/timezone-converter/agent.json
- Video to GIF: https://safewebtool.com/video/gif
  - Agent contract: https://safewebtool.com/video/gif/agent.json
- Extract Video Metadata: https://safewebtool.com/video/info
  - Agent contract: https://safewebtool.com/video/info/agent.json
- Convert to MP4: https://safewebtool.com/video/mp4
  - Agent contract: https://safewebtool.com/video/mp4/agent.json
- Video Re-encode: https://safewebtool.com/video/reencode
  - Agent contract: https://safewebtool.com/video/reencode/agent.json
- Video Resize: https://safewebtool.com/video/resize
  - Agent contract: https://safewebtool.com/video/resize/agent.json
- Video Reverse: https://safewebtool.com/video/reverse
  - Agent contract: https://safewebtool.com/video/reverse/agent.json
- Video Trimmer: https://safewebtool.com/video/trim
  - Agent contract: https://safewebtool.com/video/trim/agent.json

## Categories

- Video Tools: https://safewebtool.com/video
- Image Tools: https://safewebtool.com/image
- Text Tools: https://safewebtool.com/text
- ML Tools: https://safewebtool.com/ml
- Time Tools: https://safewebtool.com/time
